title: Tree-drum music
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{InUniverseMedia |image= |name=Tree-drum music |author= |editor= |illustrator= |artist= |performer= |publisher= |release date= |media type=[[Music/Legends|Music]]''[[Before the Storm]]'' |pages= |published in= |genre= }} {{Quote|Try to imagine that you're at home. ''[...]'' Chewbacca is playing tree-drum music at ear-splitting levels. See-Threepio is nattering on about nothing. Artoo-Detoo is behind your chair, arguing with the household droids in Basic. The hypercomm is blaring two channels at once, both too loudly. Your comlink is chirping in your pocket. You have three messages from people who want you to come do them a favor, and Leia's insisting on your attention. Lando has a raucous sabacc game going in the next room, there's someone at the front door, and a flight of airspeeders keeps buzzing right over your head.''"
"''Okay, that'd be a little worse than routine. A little.|Luke Skywalker explains to Han Solo his plight as a Jedi|}} '''Tree-drum music''' was a form of [[Music/Legends|music]]. The [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Species/Legends|species]] played [[Tree/Legends|tree]]-[[Drum/Legends|drum]] music to celebrate a holiday called [[Life Day/Legends|Life Day]] as early as [[1,500,000 BBY]].{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-an-overview-of-popular-music-and-musicians-in-a-galaxy-far-far-away-part-1|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} Between [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] and [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Before the Storm]]'' between [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] and [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] mentioned to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[General/Legends|general]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], that the Wookiee [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] played tree-drum music loudly as part of a metaphor about his duties as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. ==Behind the scenes== Tree-drum music was first mentioned in [[1996]]'s ''[[Before the Storm]]'', the first novel of [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]]'s ''[[The Black Fleet Crisis]]'' trilogy. ==Appearances== *''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-an-overview-of-popular-music-and-musicians-in-a-galaxy-far-far-away-part-1|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Music genres]] [[Category:Wookiee culture]]
